hero.sub: Building worlds, making noise, and documenting all of it.

about.title: WHO IS THIS?
about.body: TumblerPigeon is a solo game developer and content creator operating from the fringes of the indie scene. Part studio, part zine, part fever dream. We make games, we talk about making games, and sometimes we wear a mask while doing it. Subscribe if you want in on the chaos.

newsletter.title: GET THE DISPATCH
newsletter.subtitle: Irregular updates on games, dev logs, and whatever else is happening. No spam. Probably.

blog.title: THE BLOG
blog.subtitle: Dev logs, hot takes, product reviews, and dispatches from a chaotic indie life.
blog.no_posts: No posts found. Check back soon.

contact.title: GET IN TOUCH
contact.subtitle: For collabs, business, press, or just to say hi.
contact.response_time: Response time: Usually 24–48h. For urgent stuff, Discord DM is faster.

merch.title: MERCH
merch.subtitle: Something is being cooked.
merch.body: Streetwear for people who stay up until 3am debugging shaders. TumblerPigeon gear is in the works — limited drops, weird designs, proper quality. Get on the list to be first when it lands.
merch.on_list_body: You'll hear it first when things drop.
merch.fine_print: Limited drops. No mass production. Keep it underground.

footer.made: Made with late nights and bad decisions.
